title: Stage 12 late reward opportunity
problem: Stage 12 has measurable late-run pressure, but normal play does not yet surface enough boss/escort reward opportunity to feel like a Galaga-style late-stage learning and scoring window.
strategy: Freeze the evaluator, constrain candidate edits to late-stage scheduling and reward surfacing, then keep only candidates that improve reward/opportunity evidence without weakening level-arc or endpoint guardrails.
successMeasure: A candidate should raise opportunity readiness and reward evidence while preserving level-arc score and deterministic endpoint coverage. Natural late-run play should eventually produce reward opportunity without harness-only setup.
editableSurface: Scenario evidence windows that widen observation without changing gameplay

fixedBudget.label: short-platform-loop
fixedBudget.notes: This loop is intentionally short: it validates the candidate-loop machinery and the Stage 12 reward metric surface before any long autonomous mutation cycle.

evaluators.notes: Candidate loop Stage 12 reward outcome probes
